# .github

Contributor-facing operations for this public research repository live here.
These files shape intake and validation expectations; they do not validate
research claims or change research status.

## Surface Map

- Pull request template: [PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md](PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md)
- Issue templates:
  - [Media claim mining](ISSUE_TEMPLATE/media-claim-mining.yml)
  - [Open problem](ISSUE_TEMPLATE/open-problem.yml)
  - [Reference pointer](ISSUE_TEMPLATE/reference-pointer.yml)
  - [Specification proposal](ISSUE_TEMPLATE/specification-proposal.yml)
- Workflow:
  - [Lean CI](workflows/lean.yml)

## Boundary

- Templates collect proposals and contribution metadata. They are not instructions to
  change research truth.
- Claim, canon, verdict, or status movement still follows the repo-local governance
  path, including the [claim-status consistency workflow](../lab/process/runbooks/claim-status-consistency-quality-workflow.md)
  when it applies.
- Heavy Lean/Lake validation is not implied by this map; contributors and agents should
  report targeted checks run and any heavy checks intentionally skipped.
